description: Detects string concatenation via += inside loops in Java. Simplified from Rust: flags assignment_expression nodes inside loop constructs (for_statement, enhanced_for_statement, while_statement, do_statement). Cannot resolve LHS variable type, verify RHS is a string, or check @SuppressWarnings.

flag.message: assignment expression in for loop detected -- verify string concatenation (+=) is not used; prefer StringBuilder for loop-based string building
